title: The Fool Speaks in His Heart

verses.text: The Lord looks down from heav’n Upon the human race. To see if any understand, If any seek God’s face. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
They all have turned aside; Corrupt they have become. Not one of them does any good – No, not a single face. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
May help from Zion come, The Lord his captives bring! And Jacob’s tribes will then rejoice, And Isr’el gladly sing. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
